task: Go to the URL and read the text from the canvas CAPTCHA and enter it to complete the task. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/canvas-captcha.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL. It correctly identified the canvas CAPTCHA element and used the `captcha.readText` tool to extract the text "CAPTCHA123". Although there were initial issues with directly screenshotting the canvas (which appeared blank in early attempts), the agent intelligently used `page.evaluate` to get the canvas data URL, which confirmed the CAPTCHA text. It then accurately entered the extracted text into the input field, leading to a successful challenge completion as indicated by the page's success message. Finally, the agent captured a full-page screenshot of the successful state, demonstrating task completion. The agent also handled a minor error of a missing directory for saving the screenshot by creating it.
